query_strategy: Multiple YouTube search.list requests, each targeting a specific media intent.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find explanatory video, documentary context, archival footage, or scene history.
query_candidates.q: Grandmaster Flash DJ techniques turntablism backspin documentary 1975 1977

request_params.q: Grandmaster Flash DJ techniques turntablism backspin documentary 1975 1977

query_candidates.reason: The event focuses on a named DJ and technical innovations that documentary material can explain.
review_risks: Check that results discuss early DJ technique rather than later general career summaries.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a DJ set, break mix, party mix, turntablism demonstration, or historically framed mix.
query_candidates.q: Grandmaster Flash turntablism DJ mix backspin breaks 1975 1977

request_params.q: Grandmaster Flash turntablism DJ mix backspin breaks 1975 1977

query_candidates.reason: A DJ mix or demonstration can represent the technical sound-world of backspins and precise mixing.
review_risks: Use as technique context; reject unrelated modern turntablism tutorials.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find artist, DJ, producer, venue, or oral-history interview material.
query_candidates.reason: Grandmaster Flash is an explicit interview subject and the year range anchors the early technique period.
review_risks: Verify that the interview addresses early technique development or Bronx DJ practice.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a concrete song, recording, music video, live clip, or performance-related upload.
query_candidates.q: Grandmaster Flash Wheels of Steel turntablism performance 1975 1977

request_params.q: Grandmaster Flash Wheels of Steel turntablism performance 1975 1977

query_candidates.reason: This can surface performance-related material connected to turntablism, though the named record is later than the event period.
review_risks: Do not imply the release belongs to 1975-1977; use only if it helps explain technique.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a YouTube playlist, mix, or curated song collection that matches the event context.
query_candidates.q: Grandmaster Flash early hip hop DJ breaks playlist 1975 1977

request_params.q: Grandmaster Flash early hip hop DJ breaks playlist 1975 1977

query_candidates.reason: A playlist can provide listening context for breaks associated with early DJ practice.
review_risks: Check for unrelated greatest-hits playlists that do not support technique context.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find context about a named historical event, scene shift, cultural moment, or local history.
query_candidates.q: Grandmaster Flash backspin punch phrasing hip hop DJ history 1975 1977

request_params.q: Grandmaster Flash backspin punch phrasing hip hop DJ history 1975 1977

query_candidates.reason: The event is part of a larger history of turntables becoming playable instruments.
review_risks: Reject generic hip-hop history results that omit DJ technique details.

omitted_intents.reason: The event is primarily about technique and a named DJ rather than one specific venue.

review_notes: Check whether results are historically relevant before adding links.
Reject YouTube Shorts, reaction shorts, teaser clips, and unrelated short-form uploads.
Keep all automatically found links as draft until editorial review.
Verify channel/source quality before promoting any media link to reviewed.
